title: Energizing Spicy Dense Croatian Potato Stir-fry
description: This energizing dish combines the spicy flavors of paprika and red pepper flakes with dense potatoes cooked to a creamy texture. Ideal for a quick lunch or snack, it’s both smoked and fodmap-friendly.

ingredients.name: Paprika
ingredients.notes: Crushed to release color and flavor

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes
ingredients.notes: For a mild heat, you can reduce this amount.

ingredients.name: Water or Chicken Stock
ingredients.notes: To cook the potatoes in a creamy sauce

instructions: Dice the potatoes and sauté them in olive oil with chopped onions until they turn golden brown.
Add minced garlic, paprika, and red pepper flakes to the mixture. Stir well for a minute or two.
Pour water or chicken stock into the pot, bring it to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer until the potatoes are tender (about 20 minutes).
Add salt if desired, mix well with the vegetables, and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Once done, remove from heat. The mixture should have a creamy, dense texture. Serve hot.
